name: Master Mix Calculator
description: Calculates scaled reagent volumes for a lab master mix given a protocol name and number of samples. Includes a 10% dead volume buffer to account for pipetting loss.

inputs.name: protocol_name
inputs.description: The name of the protocol. Available options: PCR, Digest, Ligate, Golden_Gate, Gibson.

inputs.name: num_samples
inputs.description: The number of reactions to prepare. Must be at least 1.

outputs.name: Protocol
outputs.description: The name of the protocol used.

outputs.name: Samples
outputs.description: The number of samples the recipe was scaled for.

outputs.name: Scaled Recipe
outputs.description: A dictionary of reagent names to scaled volumes in uL, including a 10% buffer.

outputs.name: Instructions
outputs.description: Step-by-step bench instructions for setting up the reactions.

outputs.name: Units
outputs.description: The unit of measurement for all volumes. Always uL.

outputs.name: Note
outputs.description: A note about the 10% pipetting buffer included in the recipe.

output.Instructions: Set up 10 PCR reactions using PrimeSTAR protocol PG3K55 on Thermocycler 2A.
output.Note: This recipe accounts for a 10% buffer for pipetting error.

output.Instructions: Set up 4 ligation reactions on Thermocycler 1A using program main/LIGATE.
output.Note: This recipe accounts for a 10% buffer for pipetting error.
